## sab

### Sense 1: lexicon

- **Pronunciation:** `SAB`
- **Part of speech:** verb
- **Definition:** to shoulder, support, or bear weight
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** body-health
- **Root family:** `SB`; Body; shoulder, support, weight-bearing place; shoulder, support, carried weight
- **Pattern:** verb
- **Literal:** S-B root, action vowel a
- **Example:** Na sab.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `SABAMAT-LEK`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** doctrine, theory, or explanatory frame of: submission, handed-in material
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** media-communication, law-governance, ritual-spiritual, art-beauty
- **Root family:** `SBMT`; Speech; submission, handed-in material; submission, handed-in work, filed material, or sent evidence awaiting review
- **Pattern:** doctrine
- **Literal:** S-B-M-T root, doctrine suffix -lek
- **Example:** Sabamat-lek lek e rih.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `SAKAR-RET`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** right, claim, or protected standing concerning: sacrifice, costly giving
- **Register/status:** civic; accepted
- **Domains:** law-governance, philosophy-metaphysics
- **Root family:** `SKR`; Moral agency; sacrifice, costly giving; sacrifice, costly giving, loss accepted for higher duty
- **Pattern:** right
- **Literal:** S-K-R root, right suffix -ret
- **Example:** Sakar-ret ret cel sak.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `SAPAS-TEL`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** instrument, tool, medium, or interface for: to spice, season aromatically, or awaken food by scent
- **Register/status:** technical; accepted
- **Domains:** nature-ecology, travel-place, science-math
- **Root family:** `SPS`; Nature; spice, aromatic seasoning; spice, aromatic seasoning, small flavor that awakens food
- **Pattern:** instrument
- **Literal:** S-P-S root, instrument suffix -tel
- **Example:** Na ban bi sapas-tel.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

- **Pronunciation:** `SARAT-DOV`
- **Part of speech:** noun
- **Definition:** vow, oath, or pledged obligation concerning: serenity, deep settled peace
- **Register/status:** plain; accepted
- **Domains:** emotion-psychology
- **Root family:** `SRT`; Emotion; serenity, deep settled peace; serenity, deep settled peace, inward order beyond immediate control
- **Pattern:** vow
- **Literal:** S-R-T root, vow suffix -dov
- **Example:** Na dov sarat-dov.
- **Corpus:** unattested (0 attestations)

### Sense 1: lexicon
